stemHtml: The main limitations regarding CAT areas forecasting are:

options.a: They can only be forecasted over populated areas.
options.b: CAT areas are always accompanied by heavy precipitations, which makes them easy to forecast.
options.c: CAT forecasting is limited as they cannot be sensed via satellites and rely only on special AIREPs.
options.d: The CAT areas can easily be spotted due to new NASA technologies through analysis of the cloud patterns.
